recommendations.title: The Childhood of a Leader
recommendations.overview: The chilling story of a young American boy living in France in 1918 whose father is working for the US government on the creation of the Treaty of Versailles. What he witnesses helps to mold his beliefs – and we witness the birth of a terrifying ego.

recommendations.title: Vox Lux
recommendations.overview: In 1999, teenage sisters Celeste and Eleanor survive a seismic, violent tragedy. The sisters compose and perform a song about their experience, making something lovely and cathartic out of catastrophe — while also catapulting Celeste to stardom. By 2

recommendations.title: 13th
recommendations.overview: An in-depth look at the prison system in the United States and how it reveals the nation's history of racial inequality.

recommendations.title: Nomadland
recommendations.overview: A woman in her sixties embarks on a journey through the western United States after losing everything in the Great Recession, living as a van-dwelling modern-day nomad.

recommendations.title: Detroit
recommendations.overview: A police raid in Detroit in 1967 results in one of the largest citizens' uprisings in the history of the United States.

recommendations.title: Letters from Iwo Jima
recommendations.overview: The story of the battle of Iwo Jima between the United States and Imperial Japan during World War II, as told from the perspective of the Japanese who fought it.

recommendations.title: The Round Up
recommendations.overview: A faithful retelling of the 1942 "Vel' d'Hiv Roundup" and the events surrounding it.

recommendations.title: The Right Stuff
recommendations.overview: At the dawn of the Space Race, seven test pilots set out to become the first American astronauts to enter space. However, the road to making history brings momentous challenges.

recommendations.title: A Royal Affair
recommendations.overview: A young queen falls in love with her physician, and they start a revolution that changes their nation forever.

recommendations.title: United 93
recommendations.overview: A real-time account of the events on United Flight 93, one of the planes hijacked on 9/11 that crashed near Shanksville, Pennsylvania when passengers foiled the terrorist plot.
